Release Quality Standards - Checklist

Source: RELEASE_CHECKLIST.md

Package: sobol v1.0.0 Target: CRAN Release Status: In Progress Last Updated: 2026-04-23

This checklist tracks all critical workstreams for finalizing and polishing the package for broader use and potential CRAN release.

Sub-Issue 1: Core Code Verification and R Wrapper Implementation

Status: ✅ Mostly Complete | Priority: Low

Implementation Review

Code Quality Review

Input Validation

Sub-Issue 2: Documentation Cleanup and Enhancement

Status: 🟡 Needs Improvement | Priority: High

Man Pages Review

Function Documentation Enhancement

README Improvements

Package-Level Documentation

Sub-Issue 3: Test Suite Reorganization and Consolidation

Status: 🟡 Good Coverage, Needs Organization | Priority: Medium

Test Coverage Analysis

Test Organization

Integration Tests

Platform-Specific Tests

Sub-Issue 4: Package Metadata Review and CRAN Compliance

Status: 🟡 Good Foundation, Final Review Needed | Priority: High

DESCRIPTION File Review

NAMESPACE Review

.Rbuildignore Review

License Compliance

CRAN Automated Checks

URLs and Links

Sub-Issue 5: Add Vignettes and User-Facing Usage Examples

Status: ✅ Vignettes Exist | 🟡 Enhancement Opportunities | Priority: Medium

Existing Vignettes Review

Vignette Enhancement

New Vignette Opportunities

Example Quality

Vignette Index

Sub-Issue 6: Benchmarking and Performance Documentation

Status: 🟡 Infrastructure Present, Documentation Needed | Priority: Medium

Benchmark Infrastructure

Performance Documentation

Comparison Benchmarks

Performance Targets Review

Platform-Specific Performance

Additional Quality Tasks

Code Style

Spell Checking

NEWS.md

CITATION File

Repository Files

pkgdown Website

Final Pre-Release Checklist

Code Freeze

Documentation Freeze

Testing Complete

CRAN Submission Ready

Release Preparation

Progress: - Core Code: ~90% complete - Documentation: ~60% complete - Tests: ~80% complete - Metadata: ~75% complete - Vignettes: ~70% complete - Benchmarks: ~50% complete

Overall: ~70% to release-ready state Next Steps: Focus on documentation cleanup and CRAN compliance checks

Last Review: 2026-04-23 Next Review: 2026-04-30
